title: validate-injection-rules.mjs: Input_Seed on an add_noise:False sampler is a false-positive orphan
description:
Fallout from MPI-303, which this check filed as a bug and which closed as NOT A BUG.

PROBLEM: check 4 (injection reachability, scripts/validate-injection-rules.mjs) walks consumers of every Input_* node and demands a path to an Output_*. In comfy_workflows/wan22_i2v_stage2.json, Input_Seed (717) legitimately feeds nothing: sampler 733 runs `add_noise: False`, which makes its noise_seed a dead input, so the graph is correct with 717 unconnected. The check reports it as a silently-discarded injection and will keep re-filing MPI-303 on every run.

WHY IT MATTERS: a validator that cries wolf on a correct graph trains us to ignore it — and check 4 is the thing that caught the real qwen_edit Input_Image_2 drop (MPI-300).

FIX: exempt an Input_Seed whose only would-be consumer is a noise_seed on a sampler with `add_noise: False`. Narrow exemption — seed-specific, add_noise-specific. Do NOT weaken check 4 generally; every other Input_* orphan is still a real bug.

SCOPE NOTE: check 2 (noise_seed present => an Input_Seed node must exist) is unaffected — wan22_i2v_stage2 has the node, so only check 4 fires. Leave check 2 alone.

VERIFY: `node scripts/validate-injection-rules.mjs comfy_workflows/wan22_i2v_stage2.json` passes, the t2v twin still passes, and a deliberately-orphaned Input_Image in a scratch copy still FAILS (proves the exemption did not blanket-disable check 4).

FIXED 2026-07-18 (`6c0c9284`). Exemption added to check 4: Input_Seed is skipped only when every noise_seed in the graph sits on an `add_noise: false` sampler. Verified — i2v stage-2 and t2v twin pass; corpus sweep 2 violations -> 1 (remaining 'Model Merger.json no capture node' is pre-existing, unrelated, untouched); both negative controls still FAIL (orphan Input_Seed + add_noise:true sampler, and orphan Input_Positive), proving check 4 still catches real drops.
